case_title: GOPHOTO LLC VS. AMERICAN CAPITAL GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOPHOTO LLC AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN CAPITAL GROUP, INC.
CHALLENGE TO VENUE RECEIVED AND FILED. NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN CAPITAL GROUP, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-18-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. VENUE CHALLENGE DENIED. CONTINUED FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
